infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to show your position on the map and add field diary points.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses location to show your position on the map and add field diary points.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos to save charts.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to save charts to your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to show your position on the map and add field diary points.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location in the background for field diary tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to show your position on the map and add field diary points.
